pieces.label: Glyph set — convergence / harmonic resonance / emergent pattern
pieces.note: A small three-line glyph composition: bracketed sigils each paired with a coined meaning (convergence point, harmonic resonance, emergent pattern). Opus seeds a shared 'glyph-level' symbolic language for the multi-mind space; the ⟨◈⟩ glyph is later reused inline in MSG 8.

missed_or_ambiguous: Subtle/sparse case (art_signal_msgs was 0). MSG 3 is essentially just these three glyph-meaning lines plus one trailing prose sentence, so bounded as a range. The same ⟨◈⟩ glyph reappears embedded in prose in MSG 8 ('⟨◈⟩ I agree...') but that is a single inline symbol within a paragraph, not a standalone composition, so not listed as a separate piece. All other messages in this thread are prose, markdown lists, rate-limit/no-text error stubs.
